full_text:
pH Calibration Steps: 
• Check if the storage b uffer is low in the p H meter. 
• Open the pH meter black rotator at top so that you can see the hole open for measuring . 
• Wash the pH meter with plenty of MQ water and dry with kim wipes. 
• Press Cal and follow the i nstruction: 
o First start with pH 7 then calibrat e with either 4 or 10 depending o n desired pH of the 
solution . 
o Wash the pH meter electrode with water. 
o Immerse the electrode in pH 7 by Merck then press Cal . 
o It will take some time to calibrate. 
o Machine will display text to move on to second pH measuring solution , 
o Wash the electrode thoroughly and dry with kim wipes. 
o Either choose pH4 or pH10. 
o Immerse the electrode in pH 4 or 10 by Merck then press cal . 
o Once the machine is ready to measure it will give a graph. 
o Wash t he electrode with MQ water. 
• pH meter is calibrated and ready to use.
